user.title: Connect to SEVI Cloud
user.description: Enter your SEVI Cloud API key. You can find it in the SEC Smart app under Account → API access.

data_description.api_key: Your personal SEC Smart API key (Bearer token).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the SEVI Cloud API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check the key and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This SEVI Cloud account is already configured.
